title: Feuilleea multiflora

Further taxonomic information may require more detailed research.
benefits: Feuilleea multiflora is known to have various health benefits, particularly in traditional medicine. It has been used to treat fever, headache, and other health issues due to its antipyretic and analgesic properties.
